initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT c.name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON p.player_api_id = m.home_player_1
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Country c ON l.country_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY AVG(p.weight) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON p.player_api_id = m.home_player_1
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY AVG(p.weight) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON p.player_api_id = m.home_player_1 OR p.player_api_id = m.away_player_1
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY AVG(p.weight) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT c.name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON p.player_api_id = m.home_player_1 OR p.player_api_id = m.away_player_1
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Country c ON l.country_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY AVG(p.weight) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT c.name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON p.player_api_id = m.home_player_1
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE p.weight IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY AVG(p.weight) DESC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT c.name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON p.player_api_id = m.home_player_1
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE p.weight IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY AVG(p.weight) DESC
LIMIT 1;
